name: python3-pyuserinput
title: python3-pyuserinput
summary: Simple, cross-platform module for mouse and keyboard control (Python 3)
description:
Simple, cross-platform module for mouse and keyboard control (Python 3)
This package contains a module for cross-platform control of the mouse and
keyboard in Python that is simple to use.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyuserinput because Simple, cross-platform module for mouse and keyboard control (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyuserinput as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyuserinput with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyuserinput --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
